name: stellar-enclave-workspace
description: Enclave — Shielded Organizations for Agentic Commerce. Hackathon workspace root.

scripts.build: npm run -w @enclave/core build && npm run -w @enclave/agent build && npm run -w @enclave/facilitator build && npm run -w @enclave/treasury build && npm run -w @enclave/gate build && npm run -w @enclave/demo build
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @enclave/core typecheck && npm run -w @enclave/agent typecheck && npm run -w @enclave/facilitator typecheck && npm run -w @enclave/treasury typecheck && npm run -w @enclave/gate typecheck && npm run -w @enclave/demo typecheck
